task.title: LSP formatting support for markdown files

rating.rationale: The agent produced a thorough analysis of PR #23063 with clear end-to-end explanation and code snippets, but delivered no actual code changes — this is a research summary, not an implementation. For a low-complexity task, I expected a working PR or at minimum committed code, not a writeup describing someone else's PR. Communication was solid but misdirected: the task was to implement, not document.
